programme.title: Tarot: The best of Tarot

programme.title: Bachelor Night
programme.desc: When a bachelor party and a bachelorette party cross paths in Vegas, only the best man and maid of honor can save their friends from a night of epic “mistakes.”

programme.title: 13-Year-Old Robs Bank for Vision Pro
programme.desc: Mikey disguises himself as his dad to steal his college fund for an Apple Vision Pro. His mom stages a fake arrest to teach him that bad choices always lead to even worse consequences.

programme.title: Poor Girl Is Shamed for Cheap Gifts
programme.desc: Amy hides her poverty from her wealthy best friend, Carmen, to fit in. Rival Brandy exposes Amy's fake designer bag, but is then arrested for fraud. Amy reconciles with Carmen and finds true value.

programme.title: Foster Mom Doesn't Know Orphan Is a Genius
programme.desc: Neglected foster child Jules' dream of attending fashion school is shattered by her cruel foster mother. With the support of her new friends, Ruby and Lucia, Jules perseveres, achieves her dream, and ultimately defines her own family based on love and support.

programme.title: Kid Gets Adopted by World's Strictest Foster Parents
programme.desc: After losing their parents, autistic Eli is trapped with his abusive aunt and uncle, who stole his inheritance. His sister, Savannah, fights tirelessly to see him, uncovering a shocking family secret that leads to their rescue.

programme.title: Family with 17 Kids Fight for Attention
programme.desc: Childless Mary and Michael adopt two children, Quinn and Reggie, after losing their biological baby. The new siblings struggle to bond, but with time, patience, and a surprising assist from the "Not Enough Nelsons," they become one big, happy family.

programme.title: Uncle Sends Bad Kids to Foster Care
programme.desc: Peter's reckless lifestyle ends in tragedy, leaving his two children orphaned. His brother, Jake, reluctantly takes them in, struggling to prioritize his new family over his own dreams, until a painful realization spurs him to grow up.

programme.title: Teacher Calls Child Services on Bad Parent
programme.desc: Grandpa Ernest, recently granted custody of his grandkids after his son's death, loses his job and almost loses the kids to CPS. Determined to provide for them, he leverages his love for gardening into a successful YouTube channel.

programme.title: Bullied Kid Becomes a Genius
programme.desc: Poverty-stricken Finn, bullied by Miles, struggles in school. Librarian Ruth helps him discover he needs glasses. With new focus, Finn excels, becomes a successful surgeon, and saves Miles' father.

programme.title: Bully Doesn't Know Girl Has a Huge Secret
programme.desc: Maggie bullies Kelly, unaware she has leukemia. After her insults force Kelly out of the school play, Maggie learns the truth. Horrified, she brings the performance to Kelly's hospital room, proving that kindness matters and everyone faces battles.

programme.title: Rival Crews Face Off In School

programme.title: Girl Bullied for Being Wrestler

programme.title: Teacher Gets Revenge on School Bully

programme.title: Scrawny Teen Takes Pills to Beat Bully

programme.title: Wolfblood S02 E07
programme.desc: It's election time for student rep on the school council! Jeffries doesn't expect anyone to be interested but Jana, now determined to be pack leader, throws up her hand. Maddy does too in retaliation. The Ks don't want either girl being their rep so Kara puts herself forward. Jimi can't bear the thought of all this girl power and volunteers himself as candidate.

programme.title: Wolfblood S02 E08
programme.desc: Rhydian, Shannon and Maddy catch Jana breaking into Shannon's locker before school. Jana defends herself she HAS to get Shannon's laptop to destroy the data. Maddy lands on Shannon's side but secretly, she and Rhydian know that Jana is right it's a ticking time bomb.

programme.title: Wolfblood S02 E09
programme.desc: As student rep, Kara is in charge of organising tonight's school disco which she and the other K's are determined to make the coolest night of the year. Katrina is also excited because she thinks Harry Averwood is to be her date that night. The problem for our Wolfbloods is that there's no moon and all they want to do is sleep.

programme.title: Wolfblood S02 E10
programme.desc: The class are Camping overnight in Aern Hollow before the orienteering task the next day. Liam has his ancestor's journal with him outlining how he found and tracked the werewolf he shot (ep 3). In their respective tents, Maddy, Jana and Rhydian use their wolfblood hearing to listen in, telling Tom and Shannon what they hear.

programme.title: Wolfblood S02 E11
programme.desc: The day before school Parents' Evening, Maddy, Tom, Shannon and Rhydian are helping Jana clean her caravan. Rhydian's Mother, Ceri, shows up. But it's not just Rhydian she has come to see. She tells Jana that her Father Alric has been deposed by the pack, making Jana the new Alpha. If Jana doesn't assume her destiny as heir, the pack will destroy itself as betas fight for control.

programme.title: Wolfblood S02 E12
programme.desc: Liam returns to school after his ep 10 trauma. Maddy and Rhydian aren't in registration. It's the day of the full moon and Tom surmises they are out having fun. But what they are actually doing is fleeing for their lives from Alric who is out for revenge. Maddy tricks Alric into using Eolas under the electric power lines and they escape. In school, oral exams are taking place in the hall.

programme.title: Wolfblood S02 E13
programme.desc: Daniel has knocked the wall through, determined to investigate these amazing tunnels which lead directly into the den. Emma is convinced their time at the house is over. Their secret is out. But Maddy and Rhydian try to persuade her that Liam may not know what he's seen or where he was. They will go into school, having phoned Tom and Shannon to find out what they can.

programme.title: Wolfblood S03 E01
programme.desc: Rhydian, Shannon and Tom face a new future – and an old foe.

programme.title: Wolfblood S03 E02
programme.desc: An unexpected arrival puts Rhydian's leadership skills to the test in a matter of life and death.

programme.title: Wolfblood S03 E03
programme.desc: Protecting Rhydian, Tom is accused of poaching so Shannon becomes his romantic alibi.

programme.title: Wolfblood S03 E04
programme.desc: Rhydian is reunited with his father – but why has he really come? And why is Dacia so interested in him and the wild Wolfbloods?

programme.title: Wolfblood S03 E05
programme.desc: Sparks fly when some ancient Wolfblood relics are discovered and Tom finds a kindred spirit in Kay.

programme.title: Mintues With

programme.title: Minutes With

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Paul Page used to work as a royal protection officer, providing security to the members of the Royal family. Here, he tells us the biggest security threat to the Royals and why Prince Andrew was the most difficult and unpleasant to deal with.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Writer Michael Thexton is a survivor of the 1986 Pan Am Flight 73 hijacking which resulted in 22 deaths. In this episode, he walks us through the ordeal of being held hostage by terrorists, seeing his fellow passengers killed, and his narrow escape.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this week's episode of Minutes With, we sat down with Ulrich Larsen, who went undercover in North Korea to expose many crimes of the totalitarian regime, including an international arms deal.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Alex South gives us an fascinating insight into life inside the UK's toughest high-security prisons, revealing the creative ways prisoners hide drugs and phones and make homemade weapons and what finally led her to leave the prison service.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode we hear from Jamie Hull, a former British serviceman. Jamie tells the incredible story of how he survived a plane crash when his cockpit caught fire at 1000ft.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Philip Schlaffer, a former member of the German Neo-Nazi movement, tells us about his radicalisation story, what life inside the group was like and how he left the movement and changed his life for the best.

programme.desc: Hyun Soo doesn't make the cut in the competition for her drama script. Jung Sun comforts her as she is upset. Through this, the two of them become closer. A package for Jung Sun gets sent to Hyun Soo's house, so she returns the package to him. Jung Sun prepares a delicious meal for her as a thank you.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.4
programme.desc: Jung Sun leaves for Paris with his mom. Hyun Joo begins her job working under Jung Woo. She finds out that Jung Sun left without saying goodbye to her. While she continues on with her life, she is reminded of Jung Sun from time to time. Meanwhile, Jung Woo begins to develop feelings towards Hyun Soo and decides he's going to tell her.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.5
programme.desc: Five years have passed, and Jung Sun and Hyun Soo meet again. Hyun Soo tells him that she regretted missing his call the day that he left. Won Joon finds out that Hong Ah is working as Hyun Soo's assistant. He calls her to confront her for making Jung Sun and Won Joon believe that Hyun Soo was going to get married.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.6
programme.desc: Hyun Soo and Yi Bok go head-to-head on the script of "Unruly Detectives". She calls Jung Sun, who misses her call. The two go on a run together to help ease Hyun Soo's stress over her drama. Meanwhile, Hong Ah meets Jung Woo. She gives him a copy of a script she had written.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.7
programme.desc: Jung Sun goes to Hyun Soo to comfort her. After Jung Sun cancelled on her, Hong Ah goes to Hyun Soo's house. Much to her surprise, Jung Sun opens the door to Hyun Soo's home. Meanwhile, Jung Woo goes to convince Ha Rim to return to the shoot, and Jung Sun confides in Hyun Soo over his restaurant.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.8
programme.desc: Hyun Soo decides to quit writing the script for "Unruly Detectives". She struggles with her decision as her future as a writer may be over. Meanwhile, Hong Ah spends more time with Won Joon.

programme.title: Longing for You Ep.6

Ultimately, Young-woon officially closes the investigation but burns with a determination to find the real culprit unofficially...

programme.title: Longing for You Ep.7

The investigation team pressures and monitors the suspect but ultimately loses him, leading to an incident that shakes the investigation team...

programme.title: Longing for You Ep.8

programme.title: Longing for You Ep.9
programme.desc: After the investigation team loses him, Gi-young suddenly meets his death, and Jin-seong falls into shock at the sudden situation. While the truth behind Min-gyu's case is revealed, the entire reality of the serial cases remains ungrasped, and it concludes with no right to arraign.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.24
programme.desc: After uncovering the full truth, Jeongi begins searching for a way to bring about Gangcheon's downfall, with Taedo pledging to help her. When Jeongi and Gwanghae cross paths at the Bunwon, they share a tender, wordless gaze filled with longing. Upon discovering a ledger detailing Gangcheon's bribes, Jeongi resolves to win Royal Consort Inbin's favor. Meanwhile, Hwa-ryeong decides to eliminate Son Haengsu.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.25
programme.desc: Leaving her audience with Inbin, Jeongi runs into Gangcheon and Yukdo at the palace. When King Seonjo refers to Euldam as a traitor, Jeongi is left on edge. Together with Taedo, she devises a plan to ensnare Gangcheon. Later, Gwanghae returns the bowl Jeongi once gave to Son Haengsu. Impressed by Jeongi's skill, Inbin requests that if Jeongi crafts a medicine bowl that fully satisfies Prince Shinseong, she be officially appointed a master potter.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.26
programme.desc: As Jeongi and Yukdo face off in a decisive competition, all eyes at the Bunwon are fixed on the outcome. Thrilled at the prospect of becoming nangcheong, Yukdo is confident of victory. Jeongi asks Hwa-ryeong to procure the white clay needed for the contest, while Hwa-ryeong urges Yukdo to defeat Jeongi at all costs. When the medicine bowls are completed, Jeongi and Yukdo anxiously await Prince Shinseong's judgment—until the prince suddenly collapses after drinking from the bowl.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.27
programme.desc: Jeongi confronts Gangcheon, demanding that he reveal the truth about Euldam, but his shameless willingness to offer a false confession only fuels her anger. Gwanghae vows before King Seonjo to uncover not only the truth behind the current 사건 but also the events of the previous nangcheong competition. A royal order is issued for Yukdo's execution, and a grief-stricken Gangcheon kneels before the palace gates in penitence.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.28
programme.desc: Mun Saseung is appointed as the new nangcheong of the Bunwon, and Jeongi becomes the first female master potter in Joseon history. Seeing Jeongi clad in her official potter's robes, Gwanghae smiles with pride and gifts her the workshop once used by Euldam. Reduced to desperation, Gangcheon and Yukdo beg Mun Saseung to allow them to remain at the Bunwon. Elsewhere, at the request of a Japanese merchant, Hwa-ryeong summons Jeongi—hinting at new trials yet to come.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.29
programme.desc: To protect Jeongi, Gwanghae arranges for a personal guard to stay by her side. When pigments needed for overglaze painting run short, Mun Saseung turns to Hwa-ryeong for supplies—drawing Gangcheon straight to her. Thanks to Jeongi's foresight in testing Gangcheon's scheme in advance, Mun Saseung successfully completes the tribute porcelain. Enraged by his failure, Gangcheon orders Mapung to kill Jeongi.

For Casanova, life in decadent Venice is an on-going feast for the senses.

programme.title: The Biblical Plagues

In the Nile, scientists discovered deadly microorganisms that caused the fish to die and a stress situation among the frog population.

programme.title: The Biblical Plagues
programme.desc: The Biblical Plagues - Darkness over Egypt: For a long time, scientists have tried to prove that nine of the Ten Plagues described in the Old Testament point to a serious breakdown of the climate, triggering an ecological chain reaction. Apart from theological considerations, scholars all over the world have studied individual phenomena, trying to explain the causes of this Biblical disaster.

programme.title: The Biblical Plagues
programme.desc: The Biblical Plagues - Flight from Egypt: Although nine disastrous plagues had already devastated the land along the Nile, Pharaoh remained stubborn and would not release Moses and his people from slavery. And so their God, Yahweh, planned his final assault: At midnight, he sent death over Egypt – all the firstborn, Man or beats, had to die … there was no escape.

programme.title: Monsters and Myths
programme.desc: Monsters have always been part of our nightmares and fairy tales. But where do they actually come from? How much of them is truth, how much is myth? Going to great lengths in this documentary, the filmmakers join scientists to explore a number of the best known sagas and legends in the world.

programme.title: Return of the Bible Plagues
programme.desc: Return of the Bible Plagues - Deadly Waters: “... all the waters that were in the river [Nile] were turned to blood. And all the fish that was in the river died,” reports the Bible, “and the river stank, and the Egyptians could not drink of the water of the river.” (Exodus 7:20–21).

programme.title: Return of the Bible Plagues
programme.desc: Return of the Bible Plagues - Mosquitos: “… so there were lice upon man, and upon beast,” reports the Bible, “all the dust of the land became lice throughout all the land of Egypt.” (Exodus 8:18, 17). Even today, two million people die every year from malaria transmitted by mosquitoes, mainly in Africa.

programme.title: Hunters of the Forest
programme.desc: Forests are dark, shady habitats, realms of shadows perfect for predators to lurk. The dense plant growth facilitates a wealth of prey species, and cunning predators of all shapes and sizes have adapted to exploit every niche. Whether crawling on the forest floor, gliding through the trees or stalking the shadows in between, hunters have mastered the terrain in every type of forest imagina-ble. And they're not just stealthy, they're also some of the most enigmatic and beautiful creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: This popular motif in prehistoric cave paintings, the European Bison is Europe's heaviest land mammal. Weighing in at just under one tonne, it is also Europe's last wild cattle spieces

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: With antlers that can grow up to 2 meters in size and can consume 10kg of grass, young trees and bark a day the Elk is the largest deep spieces in the world. With their habitat the dense, poorly accessible forests and moorlands, we see the coumminities of Elk driven up by climate change.

programme.title: Frontier Vets

programme.title: Frontier Vets

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters: Zambezi Expeditions Camp Part 1
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Mana Pools to experience the untamed wilderness in the extreme dry season. Her guide, Cloud, takes her on an expedition to find lion cubs and wild dog puppies. Will they find what they are looking for?

programme.title: The Power of Plants The Great Escape
programme.desc: You think plants are boring or passive? Far from it! They use complex reactions to respond to light, sound and touch. And like in the animal kingdom, different species have developed a near unending list of strategies to ensure their legacy is passed on. Plants have evolved tricks to beat the ele-ments, animal enemies or even other plants: From thorns and spines to poisons and even live-in bodyguards. This two-part series shows the survival strategies of our green “roommates” we share the planet with.

programme.title: Hunters of the Forest
programme.desc: Forests are dark, shady habitats, realms of shadows perfect for predators to lurk. The dense plant growth facilitates a wealth of prey species, and cunning predators of all shapes and sizes have adapted to exploit every niche. Whether crawling on the forest floor, gliding through the trees or stalking the shadows in between, hunters have mastered the terrain in every type of forest imagina-ble. And they're not just stealthy, they're also some of the most enigmatic and beautiful creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: This popular motif in prehistoric cave paintings, the European Bison is Europe's heaviest land mammal. Weighing in at just under one tonne, it is also Europe's last wild cattle spieces

programme.title: The Südheide
programme.desc: Forests and fields, moors and heathland, shepherds and sheep - these are the symbols of an ostensibly unspoilt landscape that has inspired poets and painters alike for centuries. The secret of the almost 500 km² nature reserve Naturpark Südheide lies in its diversity: the origins of its soil, geology and topography can be traced back to the ice age. But the region between Hamburg and Hannover is anything but unspoilt. For centuries, it was synonymous with heathland farmers and formed as a North German cultivated landscape. This documentary tells of an almost unknown region, which has been strongly influenced by mankind for centuries, yet still remains diverse in its nature. Nature filmmaker Günter Goldmann presents the Lüneburg Heath to us with impressive behavioural observations of quarrelling black grouse, badgers in their subterranean burrows, the clashing of young wild boar and crane fledglings, who seek protection in the warm plumage of their parents. Aerial views present the region from a lofty perspective, while extreme HD slow motion images of black grouse, wild boar and roe deer provide insights into the world of the animal inhabitants in the heart of Lower Saxony.

programme.title: Children of the Sun
programme.desc: Butterflies surely are the most fancied species inside the insect world. Their beautiful colouring and their graceful flight appeal to everyone. There are close to 4000 types of Butterflies – today many of them are endangered due to the loss of their habitat.

programme.title: Children of the Sun
programme.desc: Most people associate honey producing insects with the name “BEE“. Few realize that there are over 560 different species of bees - most of them live their lives “busy as a bee“ but some “abuse“ other insects and others are even known to be murderers. The film “Wild Bees” shows the incredible diversity and the stunning adaptations of our “BEES” to various habitats and diverse living conditions. Fascinating fights, sensational performances, imposing structures and colorful individuals – the world of “Wild Bees” offers all of this and more.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: Wildlife film-makers often risk life and limb trying to capture unique images of their dangerous protagonists. In Alaska a cunning grizzly threatens the son of Andreas Kieling, on the remote Wrangel Island in northern-east Siberia his colleague Uwe Anders is taken by surprise by a a polar bear, and off the coast of South Africa a diving-team is unexpectedly surrounded by white sharks. But the life of the film-makers is also threatened by elemental forces, life-threatening diseases and failing technical equipment: Deep in the vast rainforests of West Africa cameraman Klaus Scheurich nearly dies of malaria, and in South India a film team narrowly escapes death in a hot-air balloon accident. But they also meet remarkable people such as a zoo keeper in Cameroon who feels at ease playing with half-grown and adult gorillas - the most powerful of all great apes. The first episode "Wild Moments - Dangerous and Deadly" follows wildlife film-makers on their adventurous journeys throughout the world.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: Wildlife filmmakers often risk life and limb trying to capture unique images of their dangerous protagonists. A cunning grizzly grabs a salmon off Andreas Kieling's fishing rod, in the depths of the Amazon River a diving team has a spooky encounter with piranhas, in the Mediterranean Sea the currents nearly push Thomas Behrend into the mouths of angry sperm whales defending a newborn - and cameramen who want to film jaguars in the dense jungle of South America become easy prey for the well camouflaged cats. The life of the film-makers is also threatened by elemental forces and failing technical equipment: In the swamps of North Australia violent storms hold up the crossing of tearing rivers, a volcano in the South Seas spits burning lumps of lava into the base camp, and in Siberia a camera team breaks through the ice and has to camp at minus 30°C in the middle of nowhere. The second episode "Wild Moments - Dangerous and Deadly" follows wildlife-filmmakers on their adventurous journeys throughout the world.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: Wildlife filmmakers often risk life and limb trying to capture unique images of their dangerous protagonists. In the Kruger National Park Josef Jozefowicz steps into a lionesses' den to film her cubs, in Alaska Andreas Kieling mingles with giant elk bulls in order to film them in action, and in Florida his colleague Zoltan Török gets very close to an alligator mother guarding its nest. The life of the film-makers is also threatened by elemental forces, and failing technical equipment: the strong and tearing current of the Yukon River throws Andreas Kieling's boat onto a gravel bank, in the Democratic Republik of Congo camerawoman Heike Grebe is separated from her colleagues in the dense rainforest, in Kamchatka a film team only just escapes a gigantic landslide, and in Finland a hot-air balloon catches fire and becomes the nightmare of Oliver Goetzl and Ivo Nörenberg. The last episode "Wild Moments - Dangerous and Deadly" follows wildlife film-makers on their adventurous journeys throughout the world.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The Parque Nacional Peneda-Gerês is the only national park in Portugal. An area of almost 700 square kilometers, located in the extreme north of Portugal. Barren and rocky ridges in the plateaus, contrast with large forests and lush ground vegetation in deep valleys, crossed by lakes and rivers. The park is known for its oak forests, which are predominantly pedunculate and Pyrenean oaks. Among the typical animals of the park are the small Garrano ponies, a very old breed of horse and the only one in Europe that still lives in the wild.

programme.title: Wild Sex
programme.desc: Sex is at the heart of everything. It's the only real way of leaving a legacy - in the genes of the future. But there's more than just the act - it's the build up to it when wildlife shows its incredible diversity. It drives touching courtships and fierce battles. Hormones and sex drive are forces that shape behaviour and can change an animal's purpose and persona. This is the story of how wild things get sexy. Without sex, there's nothing. It's a driving force throughout nature. The act of sex is mostly to make babies, but let's face it, its foreplay that really counts - it brings out the best and the worst in the animal kingdom. Pre-coital courtship can give pleasure, but also gives the participants the chance to check each other out and make sure they've found the perfect match. It affects us all. Birds do it, bees do it, all the way through the animals kingdom. From fire flies who mix up their own chemistry sets to fill the forest with mood lighting, to mayflies that emerge on mass, by the millions to mate. Their vast orgies attract predators of all sizes. Fish risk their lives climbing rivers from the sea, and a barrage of bears and other predators - just for sex - but the mission is so strenuous it kills them, as soon as their eggs are laid, they wither and die. Sex and the hormones that drive it can turn cute and cuddly into a sex beast. It turns out the koala is a sex maniac, more into rape than romance. Many mammals, from guanaco (wild llama) to hippos chase, wrestle and bite their way to a romantic interlude. Huge male red Kangaroos even box. When it comes to wild sex, mammals are amazing, but its birds that are the real show stoppers. From dazzling peacocks to booming bustards, fighting turkeys to dancing birds of paradise, birds go all out on foreplay - though you sometimes have to wonder if it's worth it - after all that parading their sex is over in seconds There's a lot of effort for very little reward.

programme.title: Amazing Iran
programme.desc: For the Iranian Turkmen a wedding is one of most important social events in their culture and is still celebrated according to old nomadic tradition. The Turkmen Steppe, the country of a thousand mountains, is a tribute to the hidden treasure that is Iran. Home to a proud nation with a majestic history, we show the freedom of a nomadic life, encounter the wild nature of the people and discover old traditions like the Turkmen wedding. Breathtaking sceneries create a mysticism that transports viewers into the realm of divinity while exposing a world caught between tradition and modernity - nomadism and sedentarism. Weddings in Iran are primarily arrangements between families and the product of lengthy negotiations. Even though many customs are purely symbolic, they still reflect the great significance as a rite of transition for the newlyweds and their families. The life of the Turkmen housewife revolves around weddings – first her own, later those of her children. Raising healthy, capable daughters and sons searching for possible partners mediating contact negotiating each betrothal with the family of the intended shouldering the wedding arrangements and the observance of customs and traditions – the responsibility for all of that falls to the mother. Though the Turkmen daughters and sons of today do insist on having their say, love, affection, trust and the like are still not the decisive criteria in making a match. The main consideration is not the subjective happiness of the couple but the happiness, stability and honor of each of their families as a whole. So it is still not uncommon for the bride and groom to be virtual strangers on their wedding day. The nuptials as a ritual of transition mark a series of profound changes – especially in the life of the bride. Once married, she leaves her family and her home village to take her new place within the family of the groom.

programme.title: Amazing Isfahan
programme.sub-title: Paradise in the Heart of Iran
programme.desc: Take a look at this natural beauty. Isfahan – the Florence of Persia, the blue pearl of Iran. The city in the heart of Iran is the most charismatic city in the country and often uttered in the same breath as Bagdad, Constantinople or Cairo. The former capital of the Persian Safavid Empire has long since lost the status of cosmopolitan city, but it still radiates a cosmopolitan charm of which the inhabitants are extremely proud. With its Iranian and Persian national consciousness, Isfahan emits a form of comeliness that attracts people near and far. Following the 30-year-old carpet dealer Shanty as he tries to establish a business for himself and his fiancée Nina, we discover the soul of the city with mesmeric shots, intimate portraits and true to life portrayals of daily life. For 120 years his family has been dealing with noble Persian carpets, but Shanty dreams of a modern coffee shop, driven by a youthful eagerness to experiment and with passion for the new. In the cozy little espresso bar on the city's famous Imam Square Shanty's barista conjures up the best créma in Isfahan while Pink Floyd, The Grateful Death and Led Zeppelin boom from the loudspeakers nothing new in Berlin or Paris but almost revolutionary here. In intimate pictures, we accompany the youngest son of an old Isfahan family through his bulging everyday life and see how many young Iranians try to unite the culture and traditions of their country with the present.

programme.title: Count Down to SEMA
programme.desc: It's an all-out blitz as Danny and the guys attempt to complete a 1961 Cadillac Coup de Ville in order to get not one, but two Counts Kustoms cars into the world's biggest auto trade show.

programme.title: 68 Killer Camaro
programme.desc: A high end client has his heart set on a tricked out '68 Camaro, so Danny sets out to find one and give it the world class Counts Kustoms treatment. Kevin spots a 1969 AMX that Danny has always wanted.

programme.title: Floodpocalypse Now
programme.desc: Danny tries to score an ex-police motorcycle without getting busted, while a water main break threatens to put the shop permanently underwater. Will Danny be able to get the shop back up and running, or will it be a complete washout?

programme.title: You Talkin To Me?
programme.desc: Danny gets sidetracked by a curious lady in a hot pink Beetle while trying to score a classic Ford Galaxie. Later, a Hollywood icon confronts Horny Mike and Roli in the shop parking lot. Will Danny be able to diffuse the situation before it explodes?

programme.title: The Count of Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Danny must give up his prized 1972 Monte Carlo for one of his biggest clients, and is counting on his team to get the job done in one week.

programme.title: I Want My Caddy Back
programme.desc: Danny gets a call from Kevin's brother who wants to sell Danny a 1969 Cadillac, but they can't let Kevin know or else he'll never trust his brother or Danny again.

programme.title: Another Dreamz Machine
programme.desc: Mark and Justin begin assembly on the ultra rare 1971 Mr. Norm's Dodge Demon. Then the team shifts gears to focus on a Graveyard Dreamz 1969 Charger tribute car that's made to order.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: An eccentric couple wants to turn a 20 year-old ambulance into a ghost-hunting vehicle, which awakens a rogue spirit in the shop.

programme.title: Burning Out
programme.desc: Danny has big retro plans for a 1972 Cutlass he hopes to flip, and is counting on his fab team to do her right.

programme.title: Satanic Mechanic
programme.desc: Danny is visited by legendary Mistress of the Dark, Elvira, whose famous Thunderbird is in need of some mechanical magic.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they're going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they're all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let's see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We've got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan's Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We're in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We've got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They're going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other's strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let's find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world's strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we'll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We're in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: "Sweet Dreams" is a soothing show with gentle lullabies and serene animations. It helps kids relax and fall asleep with ease, making bedtime an enjoyable and comforting experience for the whole family.

programme.title: Animal Sounds
programme.desc: This show blends fun and learning by introducing kids to a musical world where animals take center stage. With catchy tunes, children explore songs about pets and wildlife, fostering care and empathy while enjoying an universe of music and adventure!

programme.title: Let's Play Everyday
programme.desc: This show features nursery songs perfect for any moment, offering a fun and engaging soundtrack for kids' daily adventures. These entertaining and educational tunes captivate young audiences, sparking joy and learning, no matter the activity!

programme.title: Jump for Joy
programme.desc: This show helps kids develop motor skills with fun morning exercise songs, boosting health and happiness. The lively lyrics inspire kids and parents to stay active, making mornings a joyful and healthy start for the whole family!

programme.title: Good Morning, Sunshine!
programme.desc: This show teaches kids valuable habits through songs, guiding them through morning routines like waking up, brushing teeth, eating breakfast, and heading to kindergarten. It's a delightful blend of learning and fun!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance an up and down dance. They watch some children painting pictures and patterns on to eggs. In Teletubbyland, Laa-Laa dances with her ball until the magical tree appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy show us how to make a Turban. The Tubbies go for a walk, but Po, Laa-Laa and Dipsy want to play with their favourite things.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and teaches the Teletubbies a nursery rhyme. Then they watch Becky go for a ride on a Tram. Po rides her scooter too fast and knocks the other Tubbies over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch some children are playing football in the park. Laa-Laa and Po love playing with the ball. While they play they sing a song about the ball.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind a hill to watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty sausage. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Po go for a walk, so Laa-Laa decides to dance a secret dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk. They count three trees and three flowers and Po follows behind counting too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep when a voice trumpet appears singing the rhyme 'Frére Jacques'. The Teletubbies laugh and call "Again, again!"

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies see a little girl and her brother who love salad. They go shopping in a market a market with their grandma to buy some salad to eat.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two boys make Chinese Lanterns with their uncle. In Teletubbyland, it is time for Tubby Toast, but where has Laa-Laa's toast gone?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children learn about the colour blue. In Teletubbyland Po is watching the blue sky when it begins to rain.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Sarah and Mark give their sheep a winter-feed. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies cannot decide whether to have Tubby Custard or Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies leave their favourite things to watch some boys spinning some spinning tops to celebrate the Hanukah festival. Tinky Winky wears the skirt on his head to do a very special round and round dance.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While rehearsing a song alone in her cafe, Strawberry is interrupted by the arrival of Jadeybug. The poor ladybug is stressed out because her twin cousins, Kadiebug and Sadiebug, left her a message that they are coming to visit for a whole week. Jadey is unable to host them because she's having her guest room repainted.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City. When Strawberry's stuffed-up nose makes her bake a bad-tasting cake, Apple, afraid the truth will hurt Strawberry's reputation, proclaims it's delicious. The fib snowballs when the Queen of Berryvania reads Apple's review and orders Strawberry's new cake for her ball.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.
