programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku and Hit continue to fight.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Beerus and Champa take on Zeno.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Bulma plans a victory party for all the fighters.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku starts having trouble controlling his body and energy!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goten and Trunks wind up on Planet Pot-au-feu.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Vegeta learns more about the Superhuman Water.

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.title: Emma's Dilemma
programme.desc: When Stephanie becomes obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in a float building contest and accidentally disregards Emma's ideas and design, Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to get revenge on Stephanie. When the girls enter a float-building contest, Emma is especially excited to share her design idea for the float. But no one is listening to her, especially Stephanie, who's become obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in the contest. Emma finally does find someone who appreciates her design… Tanya! Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to build the float design. But is Tanya just using Emma to get revenge on Stephanie?

programme.title: Friends of The Jungle
programme.desc: When Olivia's Aunt Sophie is getting married and the groom has gone missing in the jungle, the girls fly out to the jungle in secret to try to find him in time for the wedding. The girls are super excited to be planning a wedding for Olivia's Aunt Sophie. There's just one little problem: Olivia learns that the groom has gone missing in the jungle while working at an animal rescue station! Not wanting to worry her aunt, Olivia, Stephanie and Mia secretly fly to the jungle to try and find the groom, Henry, rescuing a few animals along the way. Too bad Emma and Andrea couldn't keep the secret back in Heartlake City. Now, Sophie, Emma and Andrea join the others in the jungle to try and find Henry before the rapidly approaching wedding date!

programme.title: Can Of Worms
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago. The Ninja are not faring well, when a mysterious Samurai shows up and saves the day.

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers. With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: The Golden Castle
programme.desc: When Lance is cast as the star in the new remake of the classic movie “Ned Knightly and the Golden Castle” he doesn't anticipate Jestro and his monsters invading the set and ruining his starring role. It's movie time! Lance does something very Lance: he agrees to star in a movie about remake of a classic film in Knighton: “The Golden Castle.” While pillaging a village, Jestro and the Book of Monsters see a movie poster for “The Golden Castle” and the book says the legendary Golden Castle is filled with riches! Jestro explains that it's just a dumb movie and that it's not real. It's all based on a “script.” The Book, who's been shelved for many years, wants to eat the movie script to learn more about the modern world. On the set of the movie, Lance has invited the other Knights to act as extras. When they see how Lance is being portrayed, they're incensed. When Jestro attacks the movie set to get the script for his book to eat, the film director keeps rolling. This battle footage is fantastic! The Knights defeat Jestro even though the movie set is trashed. The director will make it work. At the premier of the movie, Lance is embarrassed to see that he's been reduced to comic relief for the realm's bravest Knight…Macy! The director has now made her a star.

programme.title: The Maze Of Amazement
programme.desc: The Knights find themselves trapped in a maze looking for the Book of Deception. But will they actually get their hands on it, or will it keep deceiving them? The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl's home town of DIGGINGTON (where they realize that all of Axl's family look just like him.) While they're there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books! It's “The Book of Deception.” They go to find it and discover it ended up under a mountain. And, to make matters worse, the magic book has built a maze around itself to keep it from being found (it is deceptive!) As the NEXO-Knights enter the maze from one side, Jestro enters from the other the Book of Monsters has led him to the maze to get The Book of Deception, too. It's a race through this confusing maze to see who can get the book first. Ava figures out the maze is the Whackman maze from a videogame. After help from Axl's people to defeat Jestro and win the book, the knights discover it's a FAKE BOOK of deception. The Book of Deception created a fake copy of itself!

programme.title: The Black Knight
programme.desc: It seems the NEXO-Knights are attacking villages throughout the realm! But why? A mysterious Black Knight appears to defend the cities from the rogue NEXO-villains! Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they're booed and pelted with food. Why does everyone hate them? To make matters more confusing, a giant Mech Suit in black – The BLACK KNIGHT – appears to defend the kingdom's villages from the fake knights. The Black Knight ends up being very powerful and throws Jestro and his fake knights for a loop. He's cool and mysterious. But when the fake Knights get the better of him, the REAL NEXO-Knights appear to fend them off and learn their deceptive secret. The Knights save the Black Knight and they open him up to find…young ROBIN! (He used a deep, deceptive voice.) The Knights realize that Robin has potential. But maybe he still has some learning to do.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Autobots race to stop Shockwave from destroying the planet.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With an impending Decepticon invasion, Prime asks Ratchet and Sari for an upgrade.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime's upgrade is tested when the Decepticon invasion proves more deadly than expected.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. Optimus Prime and Autobots protect the AllSpark, clashing with Decepticons on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Part 2 of 3. Optimus Prime and Autobots protect the AllSpark, clashing with Decepticons on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons capture all the children to use as hostages in exchange for the Autobots's minicons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The latest minicon re-activates in the subway system of a large city.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From an ancient submerged city a beautiful girl issues a warning about the devastating power.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Dinobot hands over one of the golden discs to Megatron, betraying the Maximals.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Tigatron and Airazor discover a new alien artifact.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron boards an alien ship and plots a path to destroy Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The dark secret of the Axalon's original space mission was to dump Protoform X.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Dinobot takes on the Predacons alone to save humanity's future.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A damaged stasis pod reveals a deformed, monstrous robot - dangerous to both Maximal and Predacon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Autobot Tracks is damaged while trying to help authorities investigate a plague of car thefts.

programme.title: Smurf On The Run
programme.desc: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfs That Time Forgot: Being kind to animals brings unforeseen results for the Smurfs when they decide to bring a baby dinosaur back home... in its own era! This is the start of a series that spans space and time.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Swapping Smurfs: In trying to avoid doing his chores, Lazy Smurf finds an old abandoned well with an interesting peculiarity: anything that goes down in the bucket comes back up in its original brand-new condition. But is it good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Viking: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's Marvelous Toy: It's been a few hundred years since Grandpa Smurf has seen this old toy… It was given to Papa Smurf long, long ago and he does not remember what it does. But Baby Smurf does know that it brings surprises for everyone!

programme.title: He Who Smurfs Last
programme.desc: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.

programme.title: Jokey's Medecine
programme.desc: Because of Jokey's pranks, none of the Smurfs believe him when he tells them that Azrael the cat is ready to pounce on them. Feeling guilty and responsible, he hurries to Gargamel's castle and plays some explosive jokes on the wizard and his cat so he can free his friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Royal Drum: No one believes Grandpa Smurf when he tells of far-away jungles and savannahs teeming with wild giant cats, striped horses, long-necked leaf-eaters and strange tribes... Only some Smurflings give some credit to his tales. But when Grandpa Smurf hears the sound of the magic Royal Drum in the forest, the one that can tame wild beasts, he sets out to prove that he's not an old addle-brained storyteller.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I: What, or who, is that strange being in the forest? It looks vaguely like a Smurf, but it chatters away like the squirrel that seems to be accompanying it… And why is Papa Smurf talking about the Lost Smurfling?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Snappy's Puppet: Snappy has a new trick: he frightens everybody, or tries to, with his hand-puppet dragon. But it gets, shall we say, out of hand when Papa Smurf's magic liquid falls on the puppet and it comes alive. Alive and kicking, what's more, endangering Snappy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby Smurf Is Missing: Thinking Baby Smurf is a leprechaun, two poachers kidnap him and try to get the small one to tell them where his pot of gold is hidden. Papa Smurf organizes everyone to attack the villains with Smurfberry pies so Baby can escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfing Out Of Time: None of the Smurfs seem to have time to play with the Smurflings. They go on a visit to Father Time and come across the River of Time, the great current that flows along majestically, carrying with it all the time in the world. And then an accident occurs, with untimely consequences...

programme.title: Tailor's Magic Needle
programme.desc: Tailor Smurf has to make an outfit for every Smurf before the Fall fashion show. Brainy Smurf wants to help him and, using Papa Smurf's book of Magic, he conjures up a magic needle that sews ten times faster than tailor... But is it really any good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Memory Melon: Selwyn and Tallulah are two powerful married wizards. The trouble is, they fight all the time. But the energy from their arguments is brewing up a dreadful storm and Papa has to get them to make up before the storm starts to rage.

programme.title: S1 Critter Chaos
programme.desc: Animals, fleas and farmyard madness spark wild Rabbid antics.

programme.title: S1 Supernatural Bwah‑ventures
programme.desc: Aliens, hypnosis and spooky surprises send Rabbids into weird territory.

programme.title: S1 Escape Mode
programme.desc: Breakouts, chases and runaway Rabbids in a high‑energy escape spree.

programme.title: S1 Dream Bwah‑scapes
programme.desc: Nightmares, naps and dreamland disasters take Rabbids into surreal chaos.

programme.title: S1 Monster Bwah‑sters
programme.desc: Creepy creatures and spooky silliness bring monstrous Rabbid mayhem.

programme.title: S1 Science Bwah‑nado
programme.desc: Wild inventions and messy experiments spiral into brilliant Rabbid disasters.

programme.title: S2 Robo‑Bwahs
programme.desc: Robots rise, circuits spark and Rabbids battle their mechanical doubles.

programme.title: Berry Naughty
programme.desc: Oh, what a ripe, sweet, and beautifully-smelling raspberry! Masha has gone picking berries, but Bear had strictly forbidden it. Now she'll do anything to avoid admitting that she disobeyed him. The situation goes too far, and everyone in the forest gets involved in the debacle. So what will the strict Bear do?

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Seven Young Kids
programme.desc: This educative tale teaches us that caution should never be dismissed. Mother-Goat goes to pick up cabbage, leaving her seven kids alone at home. Hungry Wolf tries to get into the house imitating mother Goat's voice to fool the little yeanlings. He manages to deceive six kids, but the seventh, the smallest one, manages to hide in the oven. The Wolf tries to get into the house through the chimney, but here comes Mother-Goat and finds her seventh kid. She melts the stove, and the Wolf rushes into the forest with his tail burnt. The other six kids come back home and finally the family reunites.

programme.title: The Fox and the Rolling Pin
programme.desc: This is the story about the Fox, the Cat and the Rooster. The sneaky Fox wanted to fool the Cat in order to eat the Rooster and get a rolling-pin. No matter how the Fox tried to butter up the Cat, he denied hand over the Rooster to the Fox. To teach her a lesson, the Cat got into a bag himself and when the Fox opened it in order to eat the Rooster, the Cat jumped out of it and frightened her. The point of the story is that “if you are well off you don't seek better”.

programme.title: Go I Know Not Whither
programme.desc: Once upon a time there was a king. He was very cranky and foolish. One day he wished to taste an exotic fowl and sent Yegor the huntsman to the deep forest. In the forest, Yegor met a starling, which turned into a beautiful girl. The Tsar saw Yegor to have successfully completed his task and also got the beautiful wife. He started to envy Yegor. The Tsar decided to send Yegor over distant seas to bring do not know what. Despite Tsar's insidious plan, Yegor has successfully returned back home and even taught the king an important lesson not to envy other people.

programme.title: The Frog Princess
programme.desc: There lived a Tsar with his three sons. The oldest son married on nobleman's daughter, the second one married the merchant's daughter, while the youngest son - on the Frog. She was not pretty, but happened to be the Frog Princess who turned into a beautiful girl. This story teaches us to take care of your pets. This is the only way they could appeal to your concerns and become your faithful friends.

programme.title: Liar, Liar, Pants On Fire
programme.desc: Kids love daydreaming and show off their imaginary successes, aren't they?! Masha and Panda grip into a real cheating competition! This would be very funny story If only all the secrets were not revealed all at the most inopportune time!

programme.title: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard, but yet he has no idea that soon he would have to pull Masha from a puddle and a jar of jam. But it's not all- now the Bear has to sew new dresses eve-ry time when Masha will get wet or dirty.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: Masha wants some sweets but first she has to transform the Bear's kitchen into a candy-making factory. As we all know, such sweet life means trouble and soon Masha gets a toothache. There is a lesson for all children who love sweets - take very good care of your teeth!

programme.title: Princess or Dragon?
programme.desc: A snow tower? Check. A group of friends? Check. Sound like a recipe for a fun game! Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie and Penguin – what wouldn't you do for the sake of the children! But who will be the Princess? And who will be the Dragon? And the knight and his brave steed? Masha has her own opinion on these questions…

programme.title: Well-beeing
programme.desc: What happens when bees overeat chocolates? Masha becomes their personal trainer! Get ready! Let's start weight loss exercises!

programme.title: How to Train Your Plant
programme.desc: She-Bear is going to a resort and leaves Bear with her “pet” – a flycatcher. The modest flower suddenly shows an excellent appetite. Masha, of course, knows better than anyone how to treat the flycatcher. She-Bear will be surprised when she returns to the forest and sees what came out of such a “feeding”!

programme.title: Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: The Bear plays checkers. Masha interrupts him asking to feed her. The Bear cooks some porridge for her. But Masha doesn't like it. The Bear goes off in a huff. Masha decides to cook porridge her-self. But soon the porridge swells out. All the for-est inhabitants will remember this day for long…

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: When you're with your best friends, adventure is right around the corner! This time Masha and her faithful companions go on an amazing journey for pirate treasures. What awaits the brave travelers on the road ahead?

programme.title: The Mystery Guest
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there! Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help the baby, and, of course, Masha tags along with him. Although if we are to face danger, then we must do so together!

programme.title: Quartet Plus
programme.desc: To play in a quartet is not so easy as it seems, especially if there is no slack between musicians. This is what Masha tells Papa Bear, who came to visit. And he will tell about Bear's childhood and how he was mischievous with the Himalayan bear. Has anything changed since then? We will learn it from the new episode. And most importantly, music will unite everyone!

programme.title: Swept Away
programme.desc: Masha and the Hare are having an epic game of hockey. When the game is at its peak, Masha goes off to find the missing puck and stumbles upon a broom. Now this is much better than a hockey stick and Masha gets an idea. But it turns out the broom can be used for things other than hockey.

programme.title: When Life Gives You Lemons
programme.desc: The Bear has a plan to save the sweltering She-Bear> He's planned a date and made refreshing homemade lemonade from his own grown lemons. But as usual, Masha bursts into the plan. Treat the whole forest with lemonade - that's the best idea! Quiet date - that's not great! Hello lemonade fever!

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Masha is the best "mommy" in the world, but even she can not put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: a music box. And everything would have been fine, but the music box suddenly turns out to hold a surprise inside it!

programme.title: Arts and Crafts Day
programme.desc: Masha announces Arts and Crafts Day. Get your glue, pencils and any unnecessary things and let's create! The Bear is trying to sneak away on a fishing trip. But what will he catch if all his floats are gone for crafts? Is it Masha, to put her in a corner? Well, not this time. Friendship always wins in our creative contests!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Grim Testament About One Snotty Boy
programme.desc: Have you ever heard that the world around is full terrible plagues and diseases? One boy called Semushka knows it for sure! Wherever he threw a glance – he seemed to see tetanus, rubella and other kinds of chickenpoxes…The poor boy was so terrified that began to squish his nose even harder. The only saving measures was an aid kit which his grandmother has put in his backpack “just in case” and a little spacesuit…Basically…this grim “testament” about such a snotty boy came out to be the most educative one!

programme.title: A Myth Full Of Grief And Despair About One Historical Error
programme.desc: Do you know what children are scared the most of at school? What makes them tremble?! Here is a boy called Arkasha who really doesn't like history lessons. The most frightening thing for him was…a history test. He tried his best to prepare for the test, however he fell asleep. When he opened his eyes he saw all the range of historic characters chastising him for his illiteracy, and Napoleon was even ready to hit him on the head with a globe! Arkasha was so scared that vowed to learn all the names and dates, otherwise how could he protect himself from such nervous historic creatures?!

programme.title: Panic Unbearable Legend About Insects
programme.desc: Once there was a girl called Anya who was very scared of insects! One day Anya's mother asked her to help around the house but in everything she did, Anya was haunted by spiders and all kinds of midges! She was on the edge of despair when her little brother proved to her, that little crumbs can't be of any danger to giants like children!

programme.title: Happy New Year… Again!
programme.desc: Masha decides celebrating New Year once is not enough and goes to mysterious China, where dragons dance, gardens bloom and many, many more interesting things are happening!

programme.title: Like Cat And Mouse
programme.desc: Alert! Bear's fridge is in danger! Someone has burst into his house to stay for life…but the Bear is ready for everything to defend his stocks! He calls for a savior, but in reality it turns to be a new intriguing story full of unexpected discoveries which leads Masha to some peculiar conclusions!

programme.title: At Your Service
programme.desc: The technologies some time can teach us a human lesson like in this story about two robots. One of them was presented to Masha for her birthday and the other one was made by the Bear to help him around, but tried to become the boss. Everything turned into great mess and only an unexpectedly awakened feeling between two robots put everything in its place.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: Bon Appétit
programme.desc: Panda- the Bear's distant relative pays one more visit to the Bear. They start making Chinese dump-lings, but then Masha appears, with her own methods of cooking. And a simple cooking turns into a culinary master class with butterflies!

programme.title: Once In A Year
programme.desc: The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.

programme.title: Prances With Wolves
programme.desc: The Wolves that live in the forest come with a plan to kidnap Masha and demand the Bear to pay a ransom. However the Bear is pleased to find Masha gone and he does not rush the events. Meanwhile Masha turns the Wolves' lives into a hell and they end up paying the ransom to the Bear just to get rid of her once and for all.

programme.title: Around the world in one day
programme.desc: The Bear is preparing to go on a world trip, but a last minute accident makes him panic. In the meantime, Masha knows the best way to prepare for the trip and shares it with the Bear.

programme.title: Princess and the Beast
programme.desc: Shocking and sensation! For the first time in our forest! A couple of tourists broke into the Bear's house without an invitation in search of impressions and cool photos. And there they are - just a sleepy Bear and Masha, who really wants to play. Rejoice tourists! You will have impressions, photos, and obstacle course from here and to the city itself!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: Masha is again playing mother and daughter with Rosie. But this time an honest lot distributed the roles. Now it's Masha's turn to put on her cap and get in the stroller. Will Rosie endure mother's everyday life?

programme.title: Terrible Power
programme.desc: The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon. Get ready to learn a lesson that everything should be done with a sense of proportion, especially when it comes to beauty.

programme.title: All the world's a stage
programme.desc: The best remedy for boredom is a good game. And a good play is even better. That is exactly what our friends decided. It's just not so easy to agree on what kind of play to stage..

programme.title: The Tops and the Roots
programme.desc: There was a village and a man, living in this village. In a deep forest near that village, the Bear settled in. The Bear asked the man for some tasty treats. The man gave the Bear two options of what he prefers to eat: the tops or the roots. The Bear decided to take the tops. The man grew a turnip and gave the tops to the Bear. The tops were tasteless. The Bear asked the man to try the turnip. The man agreed on the condition that the Bear will help him with the housework and keep off the flies. While chasing away the flies, the Bear accidentally hit the man on the nose. The Bear was scared and ran away into the forest, grabbing the turnip with him. Since then, people use to say “to be a fool for one's pains”.

programme.title: Ali Baba
programme.desc: This story is about one very kind, but very poor Ali-Baba and his rich but greedy brother Kasym. Once upon a time Ali-Baba overheard the magic spell, which opens up the magic cape with numerous treasures. These treasures were stolen by the thieves and kept in this cave. One day Ali-Baba met Kasym and told him the secret spell. Kasym got inside the cape, but accidentally forgot the spell and the thieves caught him. They forced Kasym to learn the whole book of fairy tales by heart and spend one thousand days and a thousand and one nights telling these stories to them. This story teaches us to study well and avoid cheating.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.

programme.title: Tom Thumb
programme.desc: This is a story about the small but brave boy. The moral of the story is that no matter how big and tall you are, you should not offend the little ones. It may happen so that you will meet some tom thumb boy, who will beat any “giant”.

programme.title: Wee Little Havroshechka
programme.desc: There lived a woman who had three daughters - two of her own and the stepdaughter called Wee Little Havroshechka. She loved her own daughters and hated the stepdaughter who was forced to work till dawn. No matter how hard she tried to please the stepmother, she was unapproachable. Once upon a time the stepmother kicked her out of the house, but every medal has its flipside – Wee Little Havroshechka met her Prince and they lived happily ever after, and it's all because she was hard-working and clean.

programme.title: Quartet Plus
programme.desc: To play in a quartet is not so easy as it seems, especially if there is no slack between musicians. This is what Masha tells Papa Bear, who came to visit. And he will tell about Bear's childhood and how he was mischievous with the Himalayan bear. Has anything changed since then? We will learn it from the new episode. And most importantly, music will unite everyone!

programme.title: Tour de Forest
programme.desc: Himalayan Bear is once again competing with Bear! This time they have arranged a bike race, but something doesn't smell right: Himalayan Bear intends on cheating to win! Good thing Masha stands as a guardian of justice and always comes to a friend's aid!

programme.title: What's Inside?
programme.desc: "What is inside such seemingly simple objects surrounding us? How are the mechanisms that we use every day arranged? Maybe they work with the help of magic? Or maybe each system has a certain order?In this episode, Masha decides to figure out how the objects surrounding her are arranged. And in the company of an old friend, this research becomes an adventure. "

programme.title: Pokémon

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: In a seaside town, a terrifying ghost story comes to life for Brock and James.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash has a tough decision to make after encountering a group of wild Butterfree.

programme.title: Ceremony
programme.desc: Entertaining romantic comedy about a young man who crashes the wedding of an older woman (Uma Thurman) he still loves.

programme.title: A Haunted House
programme.desc: In this outrageous spoof of "found footage" movies, young couple Malcolm (Marlon Wayans) and Kisha (Essence Atkins) have just moved into their dream house. As they settle in, they quickly find they're not alone. But it's not the house that's haunted, it's Malcolm's girlfriend!

programme.title: I'm Still Here
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Casey Affleck takes a turn behind the camera to document a tumultuous year in the life of fellow Oscar-winning actor, Joaquin Phoenix, as he announces his retirement from a successful film career and sets off to reinvent himself as a hip-hop musician.

programme.title: God Help The Girl
programme.desc: GOD HELP THE GIRL is a coming of age tale set in Glasgow over the course of one hazy summer. Written, directed and with original songs by Stuart Murdoch, lead singer of the group Belle and Sebastian, GOD HELP THE GIRL is a story of a young girls problems entering adult life.

programme.title: K-9: Legend of the Lost Gold
programme.desc: When Kassie and her friends stumble across an old, broken pocket watch they begin an unexpected journey to unlock the secret of the legendary Garrison Gold. They'll have to solve riddles and follow clues to find the lost treasure. Kassie is about to go on the adventure of a lifetime!

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is based on the novel by Johanna Spyri. The film follows the adventures of Heidi, a young orphan girl, whose gift for happiness helps her when she is forced to leave the mountains for a new life in the city.

programme.title: Fairytale Fun Force
programme.desc: Oh no! The mischievous Jabberwock has stolen the dreams of all the inhabitants of the galaxy! Enter Captain Snow White and the crew of the Fairytale Fun Force the superpowered team of fairytale heroes, King Arthur, Little Red Riding Hood, Pinocchio and Robin Hood!

programme.title: Space Warriors
programme.desc: Desperate to follow in the footsteps of his absent astronaut father, 13-year-old Jimmy's dreams come true when he wins one of five opportunities to compete for a scholarship to Space Camp.

programme.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
programme.desc: Buddy is taking his show to the beaches and getting into a whole new sport: beach volleyball! Life on the beach isn't as relaxing as it sounds. A rash of mysterious crimes has been plaguing the town and paw prints at the scene seem to point all fingers at Buddy!

programme.title: Blowback
programme.desc: (2022) Tense thriller with Randy Couture. After he's sabotaged by those closest to him during a bullet-ridden heist, a brilliant thief manages to survive - and vows to kill everyone who betrayed him.

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: (2015) Sci-fi action with Ethan Hawke and Succession's Sarah Snook. A temporal agent who stops crimes before they happen is tasked with catching a fugitive who's always one step ahead in time.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: (1971) Western starring Charles Bronson and Ursula Andress. When a priceless golden sword is stolen, a rugged bodyguard and a samurai warrior join forces to take down the bandits.

programme.title: Outlaws and Angels
programme.desc: (2016) Tense western starring Chad Michael Murray and Luke Wilson. A pastor's family home provides the perfect hideout for three violent fugitives. A long night of cat and mouse games beckons...

programme.title: Dear Zoe
programme.desc: When Tess and her family suffer an unimaginable loss, she finds support from a surprising source: her biological father - a lovable slacker from the wrong side of the tracks - and the charming but dangerous juvenile delinquent next door.

programme.title: Three Burials of Melquiades Estrada
programme.desc: Ranch foreman Pete Perkins looks to fulfill the promise to his recently deceased best friend by burying him in his hometown in Mexico.

programme.title: Gosford Park
programme.desc: In 2001, Robert Altman (MASH, The Long Goodbye) took the unexpected step into Agatha Christie territory with Gosford Park, a murder-mystery whodunit set in an English country house starring a host of British acting greats and with an Oscar-winning screenplay by Downton Abbey creator Julian Fellowes.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: Love & Other Drugs
programme.desc: In 1990s Pittsburgh, a medicine peddler starts a relationship with a young woman suffering from Parkinson's disease.

programme.title: Attack of the Lederhosen Zombies
programme.desc: Zombie action in the Alps: a group of young snowboarder is stuck in a remote mountain ski resort, where an all-night aprés-ski party soon turns into a hellish nightmare of zombie mayhem.

programme.title: Death Trench
programme.desc: In the final days of WWI, an allied army unit led by a shell-shocked soldier is sent to investigate a mysterious abandoned German facility located deep underground. What they find is fate worse than death. A.K.A. Trench 11

programme.title: Dangerous Mind of a Hooligan
programme.desc: Five criminals unknown to each other are hired to complete a bank robbery. What should have been a smooth operation soon descends into paranoia, violence and horror.

programme.title: Bridal Boot Camp
programme.desc: Andy Phillips is preparing for her upcoming wedding with her fiancé, Jordan. However, after chatting with her best friend, Andy starts to question if she has what it takes to make a strong and lasting marriage.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: Assassins Creed
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
programme.desc: Clary Fray's search for her missing mother leads her to a dangerous alternate New York called the Shadow World

programme.title: Cube 2: Hypercube
programme.desc: Eight strangers awaken with no memory, in a cube-shaped room where the laws of physics do not always apply.

programme.title: Cube 2: Hypercube
programme.desc: Eight strangers awaken with no memory, in a cube-shaped room where the laws of physics do not always apply.

programme.title: Cube Zero
programme.desc: A programmer whose job is to watch over the reality-warping Cube defies orders to rescue an innocent mother.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment II
programme.desc: The sole survivor of a wartime experiment is sent 41 years into the future and must race to save the world.

programme.title: A Family Man
programme.desc: From the Writer of The Accountant and Ozark comes an unforgettably moving drama with an all-star cast featuring Gerard Butler, Gretchen Mol, and Willem Dafoe. A head-hunter, desperate to climb to the top of the corporate ladder, grows distant from his family as his life increasingly revolves around closing deals in a survival-of-the-fittest boiler room. But these dreams suddenly grind to a halt when his son is diagnosed with a life-threatening illness.

programme.title: Adventures of a Plumber's Mate
programme.desc: Times are hard for plumber Sid South. Up to his neck in bills, facing eviction from his home and in debt to a violent bookie, he desperately needs to raise some funds or else Sid will be a broken man - literally, as there are two thugs ready to break every bone in his body unless he hands over the cash he owes their boss. It doesn't help that Sid never seems to get paid for any of the work he does, as his occupation lands him in a variety of risqu situations which always end in disaster. Drastic times call for drastic measures, and the browbeaten plumber seeks employment from Dodger, a shady wheeler-dealer who can put some dubious work Sid's way. But, as always, things never seem to go exactly to plan and the beguiled plumber finds himself in further strife.

programme.title: The Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: In The Butterfly Effect Evan Treborn (Ashton Kutcher) has lost crucial moments of his life, his childhood scarred by a series of terrifying events he can't remember. When Evan realises that by reading his diaries he can unlock the past and go back in time, he tries to reclaim the missing memories by tampering with the past... with unexpected and disastrous results! The more Evan tampers with time, the more his life - and that of his friend Kayleigh (Amy Smart) - begin to unravel, and he discovers there is no such thing as a happy ending!

programme.title: Deadly Target
programme.desc: When Special Operative James Webster (Michael Jai White, The Dark Knight, Blood and Bone) returns home from duty to find his brother brutally murdered, his lethal training immediately kicks in. Fuelled by rage and a burning need to avenge his brother, he sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and nothing is going to stand in his way... As he delves deeper to identify the murderers, he finds himself at the centre of a deadly conspiracy and a secret world of corruption one which cuts deep inside the U.S. Government, reaching the very highest levels of command. With a ruthless military assassin (Steve Austin, The Expendables) hot on his trail, Webster must expose the corrupt high-ranking officials before he becomes another victim to the very plot which killed his brother.

programme.title: Killing Field
programme.desc: Drugs. Money. Greed. Death. When a drug bust goes horribly wrong, David (Bruce Willis - Die Hard) , a decorated cop, finds himself at the mercy of a drug cartel. As the violent gang seeks refuge on farmland they soon discover one man (Chad Michael Murray - Riverdale) with a deadly aim who stands between them and freedom. Welcome to the Killing Field.

programme.title: Redwood
programme.desc: Breakout film at Frightfest Festival and a must-watch for all horror fans! Josh and Beth visit a secluded national park for some quality time. Ignoring the advice of the Park Rangers, they venture off trail and come face to face with Redwood's legendary wildlife. A fresh spin to a well-worn mythology, creating an edge-of-your seat movie to shred your nerves and make you think twice about camping.

programme.title: The Furies
programme.desc: FrightFest Presents. The Furies is Halloween meets The Hunger Games in this gripping & fast paced female-driven survival thriller. A young woman faces her darkest fears with seven other unwilling participants in a deadly game. A game that can only have one winner.

programme.title: Freehold
programme.desc: Twisted and highly sinister. Hussein, a young amoral London estate agent will do anything to get his commission. His life takes a dramatic turn when he is tormented by an angry ex-client, Orlan (Javier Botet: It) who has claimed Hussein's flat as his, unbeknownst to the estate agent.

programme.title: Lowlife
programme.desc: What happens when you throw together a fallen Mexican wrestler with serious rage issues, a just-out-of-prison ex-con with a regrettable face tattoo, and a recovering junkie motel owner in search of a kidney? That's the premise of the berserk, blood-spattered, and wickedly entertaining feature debut from Ryan Prows.

programme.title: You Had Me at Aloha
programme.desc: (2021) Sun-soaked romance starring Pascale Hutton and Kavan Smith. The network sees their chemistry, but is love on the cue cards when two clashing co-hosts team up on a travel show in Hawaii?

programme.title: Just My Type
programme.desc: Vanessa and Amber bump into mystery writer Martin Clayborne. Can Vanessa's charm break down reclusive Martin's walls so she can secure an exclusive interview. (2020)

programme.title: Love In Translation
programme.desc: (2021) Romantic comedy starring Michelle Argyris. A linguistics student is approached by a charming museum curator for some French classes, but will she find herself fluent in the language of love?

programme.title: The Love Subscription
programme.desc: Lillian comes up with an investment idea to wow her boss but first she must convince her client, Grant her proposal is one he can't refuse. (2022)

programme.title: Our Take on Love
programme.desc: (2022) Romance starring Lesa Wilson. When a filmmaker teams up with a fashion designer to uncover a historic love story, their own sparks start to steal the spotlight.

programme.title: Romance in the Wilds
programme.desc: Amid a deadly wildfire, an unexpected romance ignites between a forest ranger and a geologist as they race to escape the flames.

programme.title: Ophelia
programme.desc: A dynamic and lavish re-imagining of Shakespeare's 'Hamlet' starring Daisy Ridley, Naomi Watts and Clive Owen.

programme.title: Drunk On Love
programme.desc: After a sheltered young man develops a crush on a stripper, he joins her Alcoholics Anonymous group just to be in the same room with her. Soon things become even more complicated as his meddling family and her psychopathic ex become involved!

programme.title: Save the Date
programme.desc: Lizzy Caplan and Alison Brie star in a romantic comedy about 2 very different sisters, and their adventures in love, lust and a race to the altar.

programme.title: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: When her best friend Amy has her wedding put in jeopardy, Molly decides to help in any way she can. Unfortunately, this means working together with Nick, the groom's best man and head chef of the hottest new restaurant in New York.

programme.title: At Sachem Farm
programme.desc: Ross plans to sell his family's wine collection to finance a mining interest, but standing in his way is Uncle Cullen, who has different plans for the family estate.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (1970)
programme.desc: A passionate adaptation of Emily Brontë's superbly strange and hauntingly enduring classic novel, starring Timothy Dalton and Anna Calder-Marshall as the doomed and deathless lovers, Heathcliff and Cathy. Directed by Robert Fuest.

programme.title: The Dating List
programme.desc: Abby Morel is a bright, young editor's assistant living in the big city. Wanting to get ahead in her career, she makes an unusual deal with her high-flying boss, Susan. Susan is far too busy to date, but she wants to fall in love.

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: A Toast to Love
programme.desc: A marine archeologist finds wine in a shipwreck. If she hopes to save her research program she must discover the love story behind the wine.

programme.title: Off The Menu
programme.desc: An unlikely heir to a Mexican fast-food franchise goes ‘cuisine' hunting for the next culinary big thing he can ‘borrow,' and finds himself in a small, dusty New Mexican town where people come from all over to salivate over the culinary treats of a local female chef.

programme.title: My Birthday Romance
programme.desc: A woman tired of her parents nagging her to find a boyfriend makes a deal with a guy who also doesn't want a relationship to pose as her boyfriend to keep her family off her back until after her birthday party.

programme.title: Lovely Little Liars
programme.desc: A high school history teacher's perfect life is disrupted by a sex scandal.

programme.title: Dead at 17
programme.desc: Jason and friends hide a girl's body after a party accident, leading to guilt.

programme.title: Cyberstalker
programme.desc: 13 years ago, an online stalker shattered Aiden's world by murdering her parents.

programme.title: #PopFan
programme.desc: Pop star crashes in Maine, rescued by lighthouse keeper with a secret.

programme.title: Lovely Little Liars
programme.desc: A high school history teacher's perfect life is disrupted by a sex scandal.

programme.title: Forever Love
programme.desc: A couple's lost love goes full circle between the 50's and the present.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop owners despise each other but begin to fall in love while sending each other messages on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori gets breast revision surgery and throws a party to raise awareness for breast health. Time for a Booby Bash!

programme.title: Fatal Memories
programme.desc: Psychological thriller. A woman tries to help her sister remember the events surrounding the fatal stabbing of their mother.

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Events planner Kelly meets her match in web editor Joe when planning his niece's birthday party.

programme.title: Major League II
programme.desc: The Indians are now a World Series contender. But last year's hunger is now replaced with complacency, and bad decisions by the new owner threaten to tear the team apart.

programme.title: Major League: Back To The Minors
programme.desc: A pitcher is about to be put out to pasture when he is given the opportunity to manage a team.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer is reluctantly embroiled in a series of outrageous tests by her chauvinistic correspondent, host of a TV segment titled "The Ugly Truth," to prove his theories on relationships and help her find love. His clever ploys, however, lead to an unexpected result.

programme.title: Drinking Buddies
programme.desc: Luke and Kate are co-workers at a Chicago brewery, where they spend their days drinking and flirting. They're perfect for each other, except that they're both in relationships.

programme.title: The Lonesome Trail
programme.desc: Johnny Rush, an Indian wars veteran, returns home to find his land seized by a cattle baron and his love engaged to the enemy. After a brutal fight leaves him unable to use his gun arm, Rush learns to wield a bow and arrow with deadly precision. Determined to reclaim his home and confront betrayal, he fights back against overwhelming odds.

programme.title: Showdown At Williams Creek
programme.desc: A British soldier decides to move to the American frontier and start a new life. He finds the frontier tough and struggles with the climate, thieves and swindlers. He is accused of murder and put on trial.

programme.title: Hell's Outpost
programme.desc: A Korean war veteran attempts to help a small town mine owner develop his tungsten mine in spite of efforts by the town boss to stop him.

programme.title: The Hired Hand
programme.desc: Harry returns home to his wife and farm after drifting with his friend Arch and has to make a difficult decision regarding his loyalties.

programme.title: Hate your Neighbour
programme.desc: Ken wants justice for his brother Bill, who was killed by a notorious gunman named Stevens for a goldmine map. The gunman is arguing with gangster Malone (Horst Frank) about the map. A deadly cat and mouse game between the three men ensues.

programme.title: Yellow Balloon
programme.desc: A little boy in post WW2 London gets blackmailed into helping in a robbery following a tragic incident.

programme.title: Genevieve
programme.desc: Cheerful British comedy set against the London to Brighton car rally.

programme.title: Happiest Days of Your Life
programme.desc: Confusion at The Ministry results in a girls school being joined with a boys school.

programme.title: Here Come the Huggetts
programme.desc: A scatterbrained girl disrupts the daily lives of her aunt and uncle when she arrives for a visit.

programme.title: Vote for Huggett
programme.desc: Comedy film of Huggett's plans to make a lido as a war memorial.

programme.title: Amor
programme.desc: As Hee-yeon senses her impending death, she asks Tae-woo to sort through the belongings filled with memories of their time together. While mourning their impending separation, Tae-woo stumbles upon a woman with torn clothes collapsed in the zoo's restroom one day. Despite his inquiries, she remains silent, so he reluctantly takes her home. On his way back from work the next day, Tae-woo finds her still waiting for him in front of his house. The two of them begin an unconventional cohabitation, and subtle emotions start to develop between them... Who was the woman who had been by Tae-woo's side until the end?Tae-woo, a zookeeper, is facing a terminal illness diagnosis and spends each day in the hospital with his lover, Hee-yeon.

programme.title: Friday the 13th : The Conspiracy Begins
programme.desc: Is the "Suicide Syndrome" just a coincidence in a series of unrelated crimes? Or could it be the curse of the "Friday the 13th"? Perhaps there's a hidden, grand conspiracy waiting to be uncovered? On a Friday night, on one mysterious 13th, a series of unexplained incidents occur. Aspiring prodigy profiler, 'Kim Phillip,' and elite female detective, 'Yoon Cheong-ha,' find themselves chasing after the truth behind these events. As the investigation unfolds, the mystery only intensifies, and they begin to sense a looming, massive conspiracy...

programme.title: Shoot Me in the Heart
programme.desc: One night, two 25-year old Soo-myung and Seung-min meet for the first time. They are both trapped in a private mental hospital of abusive staffs and noisy patients. Soo-myung passively takes his fate but somehow gets involved in Seung-min's continuous escape schemes. Everyone in the hospital believes Seung-min will soon become one of them but his reckless yet brave shot at life ties bind with Soo-myung and fellow patients. Will they be freed in the end?Soo-myung has been in mental hospitals ever since he was nineteen after his mother's death while Seung-min is a sane guy with a prospect as a world champion class paraglider but forced to be locked up by his half-brother who's after his inheritance.

programme.title: Just for you
programme.desc: A road movie about young people who heal their wounds from love through busking in the streets of Vietnam.

programme.title: JAURIM, The Wonderland
programme.desc: To celebrate their 25th debut anniversary, South Korea's top band, JAURIM, is creating a special album featuring 117 fans participating as a chorus. They are also preparing for a 25th-anniversary concert. Debuting in 1997, Jaurim's world, personal anecdotes, moments of crisis, and heartfelt stories about the core of Jaurim's music - 'youth' - reveal a candid side of Jaurim that has never been seen before, providing a unique glimpse into their journey.

programme.title: Hope
programme.desc: Hope is sexually abused by a male stranger and experiences trauma. But with family support she slowly heals.

programme.title: The Hill Of Secrets
programme.desc: 12-year-old Myung-eun, deeply sensitive, discovers herself and family through the healing power of writing.

programme.title: Dangerously Excited
programme.desc: When a rock band moves in below him Han's routine life is disrupted. Will this stable public officer adapt?

programme.title: 4:44 : Time Of Fear
programme.desc: Missing persons. Eerie sounds. Shadows at night. Bukchon Apartment hides more than secrets.

programme.title: Rise of the Jurassic
programme.desc: A young scientist and her team arrive at a mysterious island, looking for answers as to what happened to her father who disappeared there years ago. What they find is beyond what any of them expected.

programme.title: 7 Below
programme.desc: A group of strangers are trapped in a time warp house where a terrible event transpired exactly 100 years prior.

programme.title: The Complex: Lockdown
programme.desc: After being tasked with saving the life of a potential bio-weapons terrorist, two London scientists find themselves in a locked-down laboratory with time - and air - running out.

programme.title: Settlers
programme.desc: Following ecological disaster, a family from Earth do what they must to survive on a desolate Mars homestead.

programme.title: Trancers
programme.desc: A gruff bounty hunter travels back in time to 1980s Los Angeles to stop a twisted criminal who can transform people into zombie-like creatures.

programme.title: The Trust
programme.desc: (2016) Copper caper with Nicolas Cage and Elijah Wood. When two less than honourable cops discover a bail receipt worth a lot of money, they go in search of the source of the cash.

programme.title: Nelly Knows: A Fatal Engagement
programme.desc: (2024) Crime mystery with Pascale Hutton and Kavan Smith. Not much goes on in town without advice columnist Nelly knowing about it. But when her friend is suspected of murder, can she find a killer?

programme.title: Labor, Lies And Murder
programme.desc: (2022) Thriller with Brooke Burfitt. A pregnant woman hires a doula to help with her home birth. But as delivery day approaches and shocking secrets emerge, who can she really trust?

programme.title: Dead Lines
programme.desc: (2010) Tangled thriller with Jeri Ryan. An eco-fashion designer's big debut hits a snag when her employee turns up dead. With secrets unravelling, can she stitch together the truth before she's next?

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: (2024) Crime drama with Katherine McNamara. After her brother is convicted of murder, a law student sets out to prove his innocence. But the closer she gets to the truth, the more danger she's in...

programme.title: The Protector
programme.desc: After being released from a correctional facility and moving to a small town, Evelyn struggles and searches for meaning that is interrupted by the arrival of a mysterious book about a powerful God who brings peace wherever he goes.

programme.title: Lizzie
programme.desc: LIZZIE is a dark, psychodrama based on the infamous 1892 axe murder of the Borden family in Fall River, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Suburbicon
programme.desc: Directed by George Clooney, SUBURBICON is a cold-blooded thriller set in the peaceful streets of suburbia. Here, the picket-fenced homes and manicured lawns look like the perfect place to raise a family...

programme.title: See for Me
programme.desc: See For Me is an original, edge-of-your-seat home invasion thriller with a killer twist.

programme.title: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are on a trip, so Claudia decides to help Sydney's friend Roger to find Julius Caesar's armor, but relic hunting is not her talent.

programme.title: The Reel Thing
programme.desc: Working as consultants for an archeology adventure film, Sydney and Nigel realize the Pharaoh Amun II's props are genuine, long-thought lost relics. How can they be?

programme.title: Out of the Past
programme.desc: Claudia discovers that she was Cleopatra's servant in a past life when she experiences déjà vu while watching a catalog from an Ancient Egyptian relics exposition.

programme.title: Eyes of Toklamanee
programme.desc: Sydney and her student Adam are onto his ancestors' fabled Eyes of Toklamanee, but they are pursued by mysterious gunmen.

programme.title: Run Sydney Run
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are ambushed in Russia. Two weeks later, Sydney wakes up in the house of a man called Tsarlov, who claims to have saved her.

programme.title: M.I.A.
programme.desc: Sydney gets kidnapped, but by whom? Nigel, Claudia and Cate will have to go through the list of enemies Sydney has made in the past and deduce which of them is responsible. Cue flashbacks.

programme.title: Dont Go Into the Woods
programme.desc: Sydney's friend phones to inform her that he's discovered information on the Golden Hawk of Maribor, lost since 1711. Sydney and Nigel travel to Lubjanka to meet him, but he's already gone.

programme.title: French Connection
programme.desc: While on a lecture tour with Nigel in Europe, Sydney is contacted by MI5 because she is the only one who can prevent an impending high-level assassination.

programme.title: Angel Eyes
programme.desc: After meeting under extraordinary life-and-death circumstances, a Chicago police officer (Lopez) and a lost soul named Catch (Caviezel) fall in love. While uncovering the truth about Catch, she is forced to deal with the secrets of her own past.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Winner of 3 Academy Awards, WHIPLASH tells the story of an ambitious student drummer (Miles Teller) and his ruthless teacher (J.K. Simmons) who will stop at nothing to achieve perfection.

programme.title: Waiting For The Barbarians
programme.desc: The Magistrate, administrator of an isolated frontier settlement on the border of an unnamed empire, looks forward to an easy retirement until the arrival of Colonel Joll, whose task it is to report on the activities of the 'barbarians' and on the security situation on the border.

programme.title: Ice Cream in the Cupboard
programme.desc: Carmen and Pat's marriage is turned upside down by a diagnosis of early onset Alzheimer's. As the time draws closer when Carmen will no longer recognize her husband, Pat finds refuge in his memories of their life together.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: Eric Lomax was one of thousands of Allied prisoners of war forced to work on the construction of the Thai/Burma railway during WW2. Years later, he met Patti and fell in love. Discovering that the young Japanese officer who haunted her husband was still alive, she faced a terrible decision.

programme.title: The Believer
programme.desc: Ryan Gosling stars in the true story of an anti-Semitic skinhead who was revealed to be Jewish by a New York Times reporter.

programme.title: Ninja: Shadow Of A Tear
programme.desc: Scott Adkins returns as Casey Bowman, who is now the sensei of a successful dojo, married to the beautiful Namiko, and expecting their first baby. But when Casey returns home one day to find someone has brutally killed Namiko, bereft, Casey has only one thing left to live for... Revenge.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: When Joe Braven, a humble logger residing along the U.S./Canada border, is confronted by a group of deadly drug runners in his secluded cabin in the mountains, he must do everything in his power to protect his family.

programme.title: All The Devil's Men
programme.desc: Jack Collins (Milo Gibson), a former Navy SEAL turned bounty hunter, tracks down terrorists in missions so hazardous that the CIA outsources them to private companies.

programme.title: Hyena Road
programme.desc: Three different men, three different worlds, three different wars – all stand at the crossroads of modern warfare. It's a murky world in which they must save lives - but all is not as it seems
